topic: The Rhetorician's Development Framework — From Theory to Practice
content_preview: The originating prompt that spawned the AI-conductor research thread. Three-phase commodification method (Capture→Canonicalize, Structure→Standardize, Systematize→Scale), Constraint Liberation Paradox (single-session scope limit, three-prompt rule, parallel verification), 30-day implementation plan, progress metrics (labyrinth frequency, decision confidence), and abstraction-level discipline ('always wear a label').
